variants.be_50: MFE>=50% TP-dist arms BE; bar touching entry exits flat
variants.tp1_be: MFE>=50% closes half at +50% TP-dist AND moves stop to BE on remainder

smt.true: SI took its OPPOSITE-side pre-news liquidity (GC short → SI low<pre_low; GC long → SI high>pre_high)

meta.tick: GC_TICK=0.10 (Comex gold); detect_setup_metals is a local clone of detect_setup with this substitution
